description: Append-only log of agent question-and-answer outcomes. Each entry records the keyword, sources cited, answer given, result (found/not_found), and verdict (correct/incorrect/unverified). The agent must consult entries with verdict=correct before re-querying to reinforce known answers.

fields.sources_matched: List of source_id and path from archive_inventory.db.
fields.knowledge_items_matched: List of item_id and title from archive_inventory.db.
fields.answer_given: The answer text the agent produced. Empty string if no answer was possible.
fields.verdict: correct | incorrect | unverified. Set by user or reviewer. Agent uses correct entries to reinforce knowledge.
